title: Boss Score Toggle
description: Toggle bossbar and scoreboard visibility with commands!
body:
# Boss Score Toggle – Control Your HUD with Ease

**Boss Score Toggle** is a lightweight Fabric mod that lets you hide or show the **bossbar** and **scoreboard** anytime with simple commands. It even remembers your choice, applying it globally across your game sessions.  

## ✨ Features
- Toggle **bossbar** visibility on or off  
- Toggle **scoreboard** visibility on or off  
- Settings are **persistent** – no need to reapply every time  
- Lightweight and easy to use  
- Perfect for builders, PvPers, content creators, and anyone who prefers a clean screen  

## 🛠️ Commands
- `/scoreboard toggle on/off` – Show or hide the scoreboard  
- `/bossbar toggle on/off` – Show or hide the bossbar   


[![Fast Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e81436885d7d199d80ffde632b0895d24a2c72b.png)](https://fastclient.net/spunky)
